criteria: 1M+ views (plays or views); a REAL person in an interview/podcast/keynote/conference talking about AI (its value, risks, disruption, or their own adoption) in ANY industry — the speaker need NOT be an AI or tech figure, any well-known speaker in any field counts; NOT already posted on @theaibolt (dedup by speaker+topic vs full history); duration preferred 30-90s but longer viral clips OK (cut at edit); recent preferred but evergreen older 1M+ clips accepted (age flagged). EXCLUDE AI-generated/CGI video, memes, faceless voiceover, text-overlay news, no-speaker demos.
status: MERGED 2026-07-24: two concurrent discovery runs on the same day. Run A (dedup-only resweep): @theaibolt full-history resweep (200-limit, 143/143 items) found ZERO new posts vs prior sweep - no pruning needed; @theaiaxon dedup (STEP 1b) clean via Apify scrape (1 published reel, Sam Altman/Tucker Carlson, no backlog match) and Metricool getScheduledPosts (brandId 6566296, 0 scheduled). 6 X/Twitter + 5 Instagram searches across untried Tier 2/3 speakers and cross-industry fields yielded ZERO net-new qualifying clips (all sub-1M-view, no video attachment, or off-topic). Run B (net-new discovery, union-merged into this record): @theaibolt/@theaiaxon dedup re-verified clean (same findings as Run A); corrected a stale available_count (was 34, actually 28 available/6 review). Ran 3 parallel discovery lanes: (1) X/Twitter via apidojo/tweet-scraper across Tier2/3 researchers and cross-industry queries, 14 candidates; (2) Instagram cross-industry keyword search, 8 candidates after filtering; (3) mega-podcast recency check (14 accounts), @thediaryofaceopodcast yielded 2 fresh qualifiers. Net +22 candidates (21 available, 1 review - Tom Holland's 7s Esquire clip). Dropped as non-qualifying: a Dario Amodei WEF clip, a 3rd Bill Gates clip, a Jeremy Greene reaction video, a Jessica Reid listicle clip, an unconfirmed Honestly-podcast repost. Available now 49/100 (was 28), review 7. Pillar mix skewed Controversial (13 of 21 adds) - Educational 6, Inspirational 2, Emotional 0; future runs should prioritize Educational/Inspirational sourcing. Genuine cross-industry (non-tech, non-CEO) 1M+ content remains scarce - confirmed real scarcity, not a tooling gap. Still well short of 100; recommend continuing X/Twitter searches on remaining untried Tier2/3 names (Gary Marcus, Stuart Russell, Kai-Fu Lee, Raoul Pal) and re-verifying 3 broken IG handles (@tferriss, @modernwisdompodcast, @20vc) in a future run.
